title: Grill Tongs, 17 Inch Extra Long Kitchen Tongs, Premium Stainless Steel Tongs for Cooking, Grilling, Barbecue/BBQ, Buffet (17" 1PC)
features: 17" Extra Long Grill Tongs: These 17-inch Grill Tongs are essential for barbecuing, cooking, grilling, buffet serving, and camping. They are lengthy enough to protect your hands from heat, making it safer to handle hot food.

Non-Slip & Heat-Resistant: The anti-slip strips on the handle offer a secure thumb rest and a controlled grip. The food-grade stainless steel tips are heat resistant to temperatures higher than 600°F/315°C. No worries about melting or warping.
Premium Stainless Steel Tongs: These long grill tongs are made of food-grade heavy-duty stainless steel, with anti-rust brushed surfaces. They are safe and durable for food contact.

Easy to Use and Store: The pull-ring locking mechanism ensure the tongs won't accidentally open or close while you're using them, giving you better control over your cooking. They can also be conveniently dried and stored.
Dishwasher Safe Tongs: These BBQ tongs can be easily cleaned with dish soap or you may simply throw them into the dishwasher.
Reach Further: Other than cooking and grilling, these long tongs can also help you reach further to grab objects without bending down or stepping higher.
description: Product Description 17“ Long Heavy Duty Stainless Steel Grill Tongs The food-grade stainless steel tips are heat resistant to temperatures higher than 600°F/315°C. No melting or warping.
